title: cyrtandra × ambigua
intro: Cyrtandra × ambigua, also known as the 'hybrid cyrtandra', is a rare and exotic flowering plant that belongs to the Gesneriaceae family. Native to Hawaii, this plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyrtandra × ambigua include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and promoting wound healing. In traditional Hawaiian medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
